title: Operating element for a machine
abstract: An operating element for a machine is provided. The operating element comprises a lever (11) that is pivotable about a rotation axis (12). It further includes a restoring device (30) configured to apply a restoring torque to the lever (11) and a braking device (20) configured to apply a braking torque to the lever (11). The braking torque provides a resistance to a pivoting of the lever (11) about the rotation axis (12). The braking device (20) and/or the restoring device (30) is an active device that is configured to be controllable to actively change the applied braking torque and/or the applied restoring torque, respectively. The operating element further comprises a controller (50) coupled to the active device (20; 30), wherein the controller (50) is configured to operate the operating element (10) in one, two, or more operating modes, wherein in each operating mode, the controller (50) actively controls the active device (20; 30) to apply the respective torque in accordance with a respective torque characteristic (60), and wherein in each operating mode, the operating element (10) controls a different function of the machine.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. An operating element for a machine, comprising: a lever (11), wherein the lever (11) is pivotable about a rotation axis (12); a restoring device (30) configured to apply a restoring torque to the lever (11); and a braking device (20) configured to apply a braking torque to the lever (11), the braking torque providing a resistance to a pivoting of the lever (11) about the rotation axis (12), wherein the braking device (20) and/or the restoring device (30) is an active device that is configured to be controllable to actively change the applied braking torque and/or the applied restoring torque, respectively,, wherein the operating element further comprises a controller (50) coupled to the active device (20; 30), wherein the controller (50) is configured to operate the operating element (10) in two or more operating modes, wherein in each operating mode, the controller (50) actively controls the active device (20; 30) to apply the respective torque in accordance with a respective torque characteristic (60), wherein the torque characteristic of one of the operating modes is different from the torque characteristic of another of the operating modes, and wherein in each operating mode, the operating element (10) controls a different function of the machine. 2. The operating element according to claim 1, wherein the active device is configured to cause the actively applied torque to change during pivoting of the lever (H). 3. The operating element according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the torque characteristics (60) of different operating modes differ by the torque applied by the active device (20; 30) at one or more of the same pivotal positions of the lever (11). 4. The operating element according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the torque characteristic (60) associated with each operating mode is configured to result in an operating characteristic of the operating element (10) that is adapted to the function of the machine that the operating element (10) controls in the respective operating mode. 5. The operating element according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the two or more operating modes include an operating mode having a torque characteristic (61) that includes a locked position (72) of the lever (11) and an intermediate position (71) of the lever (11) located between an initial position of the lever and the locked position (72) of the lever (11), wherein at the intermediate position (71), the braking torque exceeds the restoring torque. 6. The operating element according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the two or more operating modes include an operating mode having a torque characteristic (62, 63) that includes a pressure point (81, 91) at a pivotal position of the lever (11) at which the braking torque is below the restoring torque and at which the braking torque has a local or global maximum. 7. The operating element according to claim 6, wherein the two or more operating modes include an operating mode having a torque characteristic (62) that includes one pressure point (81) between an initial position of the lever (11) and an end stop position of the lever (11), preferably one pressure point (81) between the initial position and each end stop position of the lever (11). 8. The operating element according to claim 6 or 7, wherein the two or more operating modes include an operating mode having a torque characteristic (63) that comprises two or more pressure points (91) between an initial position of the lever (11) and an end stop position of the lever (11), preferably two or more pressure points (91) between the initial position and each end stop position of the lever (11). 9. The operating element according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the active device (20; 30) is configured to be controllable to actively move the lever (11). 10. The operating element according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the active device (20; 30) comprises a transmission mechanism (25) that converts a smaller 

torque or force into a larger torque applied by the active device (20; 30) to the lever (H). 11. The operating element according to claim 10, wherein the transmission mechanism (25) is configured to transmit a pivoting of the lever (11) to a rotation of a transmission wheel (27), wherein an active element (21) of the active device (20) is controllable to apply a force or torque to the transmission wheel (27) to brake or drive the transmission wheel (27). 12. The operating element according to claim 11, wherein the transmission mechanism (25) comprises an internal ring gear section (26) mounted to the lever (11) and meshing with the transmission wheel (27). 13. The operating element according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the active device (20; 30) includes an active element (21), the active element being at least one of a magnetic braking element, a magnetorheological fluid, MRF, braking element, an electric motor, a mechanical braking element, and a hydraulic active element. 14. The operating element according to any of the preceding claims, further comprising a position sensor (40) configured to detect a pivotal position of the lever (11), the operating element (10) being configured to control the active device (20; 30) in dependence on a detected pivotal position of the lever (11). 15. A method of controlling an operating element (10) of a machine, wherein the operating element (10) comprises a lever (11) that is pivotable about a rotation axis (12), a restoring device (30) for applying a restoring torque to the lever (11), and a braking device (20) for applying a braking torque to the lever (11), the braking torque providing a resistance to a pivoting of the lever (11) about the rotation axis (12), wherein the braking device (20) and/or the restoring device (30) is an active device, and further comprises a controller (50) coupled to the active device (20; 30), wherein the controller (50) is configured to operate the operating element (10) in two or more operating modes, wherein in each operating mode, the controller (50) actively controls the active device (20; 30) to apply the respective torque in accordance with a respective torque characteristic (60), wherein the torque characteristic of one of the operating modes is different from the torque characteristic of another of the operating modes, wherein in each operating mode, the operating element controls a different function of the machine, and 

wherein the method comprises: operating the operating element (10) in one of the operating modes; and controlling, based on the torque characteristic (60) associated with the operating mode, the active device to actively change the braking torque and/or the restoring torque applied by the braking device (20) and/or by the restoring device (30), respectively.
